subject: docs(debug): fix stale comment in DebugPill.useState
body:
The hydration-fix comment still referenced debugGetEntries() as the
manual sync it was guarding against — but that call was removed when
debugSubscribe learned to replay the snapshot itself. The reason for
the empty initial state (SSR/client mismatch of module-level debug
buffer → React error #418) is unchanged, but the mechanism is now the
post-hydration subscribe, not a direct read.

No behaviour change. tsc 0, jest 65/65.

Tags: docs
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 1
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: debug-pill-hardening

title: fix stale comment in DebugPill.useState
